summary: Completed testing of InmoBot features: Login, Kanban, Dashboard, Reports PDF, ROI Calculator. All core features are working correctly.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Existing admin user works correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 18 tests for InmoBot features passed: Admin login, Kanban API with 8 columns (new, contacted, qualified, appointment, hot, warm, cold, completed), Dashboard metrics, PDF report generation, ROI calculator. The existing test_auth_and_metrics.py fails for asesor tests because the asesor user maria@inmobot.com doesn't exist - this is a test data issue not an app bug. Frontend Playwright tests confirmed: Login page loads, admin can login, Dashboard displays metrics, Kanban view shows all 8 columns correctly, navigation includes 'Pipeline (Kanban)' link.

test_results.admin_login: PASSED - Admin can login with admin@inmobot.com/Admin123!
test_results.kanban_api: PASSED - /api/leads/kanban returns 8 columns with correct structure (title, leads array, count)
test_results.roi_calculator: PASSED - /api/calculator/roi returns correct ROI calculations with without_inmobot, with_inmobot, and comparison sections
test_results.navigation_kanban_link: PASSED - Sidebar navigation includes 'Pipeline (Kanban)' link at /kanban
test_results.kanban_view_columns: PASSED - UI shows all 8 columns: Nuevos, Contactados, Calificados, Cita Agendada, Calientes, Tibios, Fríos, Cerrados
